changelog: REVERTED: Side-rail focus redirect (1.44.43 + 1.44.44) — was causing slow/unresponsive UI and crashes on Nvidia Shield. Rail behaviour is back to v1.44.42 baseline. Will retry with a less-intrusive approach later once we have crash-report telemetry.
